heading: Priorities for capacity development
label: 12782 Priorities for capacity development
notes: Effective Date of 1992 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to unexpended funds allocated under subchapter II of this chapter in fiscal year 1992, except as otherwise specifically provided, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 102–550section 223 of Pub. L. 102–550section 12704 of this title
amendments: Effective Date of 1992 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to unexpended funds allocated under subchapter II of this chapter in fiscal year 1992, except as otherwise specifically provided, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 102–550section 223 of Pub. L. 102–550section 12704 of this title

children.text: facilitate the exchange of information that would help participating jurisdictions carry out the purposes of this subchapter, including information on program design, housing finance, land use controls, and building construction techniques;

improve the ability of States and units of general local government to design and implement comprehensive housing affordability strategies, particularly those States and units of general local government that are relatively inexperienced in the development of affordable housing;
encourage private lenders and for-profit developers of low-income housing to participate in public-private partnerships to achieve the purposes of this subchapter;

improve the ability of States and units of general local government, community housing development organizations, private lenders, and for-profit developers of low-income housing to incorporate energy efficiency into the planning, design, financing, construction, and operation of affordable housing;
facilitate the establishment and efficient operation of employer-assisted housing programs through research, technical assistance and demonstration projects; and

facilitate the establishment and efficient operation of land bank programs, under which title to vacant and abandoned parcels of real estate located in or causing blighted neighborhoods is cleared for use consistent with the purposes of this subchapter.
